data.title: Security remediation recipe catalog for deterministic vulnerability fixes
data.description:
## Context

The deterministic transform recipe library (dso-qo0x) provides infrastructure for executing reliable, repeatable code transforms. This epic extends the catalog with security-focused recipes that fix known vulnerability patterns deterministically — e.g., SQL injection patterns, insecure deserialization, hardcoded credentials, XSS vectors.

Security remediation recipes would be triggered during code review or as a pre-commit check, replacing LLM-based security fix suggestions with deterministic transforms that are guaranteed correct.

## Dependencies

- Depends on dso-qo0x (recipe registry and execution engine)
- Coordinate with 6add-c1fc (Semgrep with mandatory security rulesets): Semgrep detects, recipes fix
- Coordinate with 857d-a35a (Shift-left security): security recipes integrate into planning workflows
